title: Creating a surrogate commuter network from Australian Bureau of Statistics census data
author: Fair, Kristopher M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
README.txt 
 

 This text file contains a detailed description for other files located here. 

 
	 Creating_surrogate.m 
 

 The MATLAB script that uses the method outlined in the associated paper to generate the missing edges for the new surrogate network. 

 
	 All_inputs.mat 
 

 The MATLAB workspace containing all of the inputs needed to create a new surrogate network using 'Creating_surrogate.m'. 
  

 
	 2011_UR_POW_commuters.dat 
 

 The travel to work data between the usual residence (UR) and place of work (POW) obtained from the Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) for 2011 on the SA1 to DZN level spatial resolution. This data set was obtained before the change of perturbation protocol and so includes the additivity step. 

 
	 2016_surrogate_UR_POW_commuters.dat 
 

 The surrogate travel to work data set produced from several ABS data sets to counteract the absence of additivity in the perturbation protocol. The process of which is outlined in our as yet unpublished paper
